body.prompt: Static camera. A dim compact bedroom before dawn, deep blue light through the window, a person asleep under a duvet. On the nightstand a phone screen glows softly, lighting the pillow. Nothing else moves. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

Medium close-up of the person from the reference image wearing the sage-green coat, standing before a mirror in a dim pre-dawn apartment. The coat shifts hue once — a slow ripple from grey-green to final matte sage — and settles. The person watches themselves, a small pleased exhale. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

Extreme close-up sequence on the sage-green knit coat from the reference image: a cuff seam sealing itself, a collar settling flat, the small white woven chest label that reads ONE OF ONE. Soft pre-dawn interior light. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

The person from the reference image, wearing the sage-green coat, turns once in front of a full-length mirror in a dim pre-dawn apartment, checking the fit, a brief private moment of vanity, faint smile. Warm practical light. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

Close-up: a hand resting on a brushed-metal apartment door handle, a sage-green knit coat cuff visible at the wrist, a beat of stillness, then the handle begins to turn. Pre-dawn interior light. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

Street level, medium shot. The person from the first reference image has stopped mid-stride on the sidewalk of the street from the second reference image. They look down at their own sleeve, then up. Micro-expression, unreadable — not horror, not comfort. Identical sage-green coats blur past in foreground and background. Overcast morning. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, shallow depth of field, no text overlays, no captions.

Static wide from across the street shown in the second reference image: the person from the first reference image walks away from camera and merges into a flow of pedestrians in identical sage-green coats until they are indistinguishable. Overcast, quiet, unhurried. Vertical 9:16, cinematic realism, 35mm look, no text overlays, no captions.
